moments.title: Lana Del Rey's 41st Birthday
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey, known for her melancholic, cinematic music, celebrates her 41st birthday today, June 21st.

angles.name: Happy Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 41st Birthday to the iconic Lana Del Rey! Which of her tracks is essential listening today?

angles.name: Melancholy Pop Queen
angles.copy: Celebrating the unique sound of Lana Del Rey, turning 41 today. Her influence on modern pop and alternative is undeniable.

moments.title: Lionel Richie's 77th Birthday (Yesterday)
moments.blurb: Legendary singer-songwriter Lionel Richie, famed for his smooth ballads and Motown hits, turned 77 yesterday, June 20th.

angles.name: Still Crooning
angles.copy: Wishing a belated happy 77th to the one and only Lionel Richie! What's your favourite classic from the Commodores frontman?

angles.name: Easy Listening Icon
angles.copy: Yesterday, we celebrated the birthday of Lionel Richie. His timeless hits continue to soundtrack our lives.

moments.title: Cyndi Lauper's 73rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning pop icon Cyndi Lauper, known for her flamboyant style and hits like 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun', turns 73 tomorrow, June 22nd.

angles.name: Girls Just Wanna Have Fun
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Tomorrow, the incredible Cyndi Lauper turns 73. What's your go-to track from this 80s legend?

angles.name: True Colors Ahead
angles.copy: Tomorrow marks Cyndi Lauper's 73rd birthday! Still 'Shine a Light' for this pop powerhouse.

moments.title: Ariana Grande's 33rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Global pop superstar Ariana Grande, celebrated for her powerful vocals and chart-topping hits, will celebrate her 33rd birthday on June 26th.

angles.name: Big Birthday Week
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Ariana Grande turns 33 this Thursday. What's your favourite track from the pop icon?

angles.name: Pop Powerhouse
angles.copy: This week we're celebrating Ariana Grande's birthday! From 'Thank U, Next' to 'Positions', she's consistently delivered hits.

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Begins
moments.blurb: The 139th Wimbledon Championships, one of tennis's most prestigious Grand Slams, kicks off on Monday, June 29th, running until July 12th.

angles.name: Ready for Grass Courts
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! Wimbledon 2026 serves up its first matches a week from Monday. Who are you backing for the titles?

angles.name: London Calling Tennis
angles.copy: The greatest tennis tournament in the world returns to London next week! Get set for two weeks of thrilling action at Wimbledon.

moments.title: Exeter Chiefs in Gallagher PREM Final
moments.blurb: Exeter Chiefs contested the Gallagher Premiership Final yesterday, June 20th, losing a hard-fought match 26-17 to Northampton Saints at Twickenham.

angles.name: Chiefs Fight Hard
angles.copy: Commiserations to Exeter Chiefs who gave it their all in the Gallagher PREM Final yesterday. A tough result, but what a season!

angles.name: Local Pride
angles.copy: Despite the final score, the Chiefs battled hard against Northampton Saints. Devon is proud of the team's incredible Premiership season!

moments.title: Wales Rugby vs Barbarians
moments.blurb: Wales will play a warm-up match against the Barbarians at Twickenham on Saturday, June 27th, ahead of their Nations Championship campaign.

angles.name: Cymru Clash
angles.copy: The wait is almost over! Wales take on the Barbarians this Saturday at Twickenham. Who's excited for some rugby action?

angles.name: Twickenham Test
angles.copy: Big game this Saturday as Wales face the Barbarians at Twickenham. A crucial warm-up for the Nations Championship!

moments.title: Wales in UEFA MU19 EURO Finals
moments.blurb: The Wales U19 football team will play Spain on Sunday, June 28th, and Germany on July 1st, in the UEFA MU19 EURO Finals.

angles.name: Young Dragons Roar
angles.copy: Huge week for Wales U19s as they kick off their UEFA EURO Finals campaign against Spain this Sunday! Good luck, lads!

angles.name: Future Stars
angles.copy: Keep an eye on the future stars of Welsh football! Our U19s face Spain on Sunday and Germany on July 1st in the Euros.

moments.title: Isle of Wight Festival Wraps Up
moments.blurb: The Isle of Wight Festival concludes today, June 21st, after a weekend of music featuring a diverse lineup of artists.

source.l: Isle of Wight Festival Official Site

angles.name: Festival Finish
angles.copy: That's a wrap on Isle of Wight Festival 2026! Who caught some amazing sets this weekend?

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: The Isle of Wight Festival wraps up today after a fantastic weekend of live music! What were your highlights?

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival Ends
moments.blurb: TRNSMT Festival in Glasgow Green concludes today, June 21st, after a weekend packed with top artists.

angles.name: Glasgow Green Farewell
angles.copy: And that's it for TRNSMT 2026! Glasgow Green delivered another unforgettable weekend of music. What was your favourite moment?

angles.name: Festival Wrap-Up
angles.copy: TRNSMT Festival finishes up today! Hope everyone had an incredible time in Glasgow enjoying the live acts.

moments.title: Parklife Festival Ends
moments.blurb: Parklife Festival at Heaton Park, Manchester, wraps up today, June 21st, after showcasing a huge lineup of electronic and pop acts.

angles.name: Manchester Memories
angles.copy: Another Parklife comes to a close in Manchester! Who had the best time at Heaton Park this weekend?

angles.name: Festival Finale
angles.copy: It's the final day of Parklife Festival! Hope everyone enjoyed the incredible music and atmosphere in Manchester.

moments.title: Hampton Court Palace Festival Continues
moments.blurb: The Hampton Court Palace Festival, a series of summer concerts in a historic setting, continues this week with a diverse lineup of artists.

angles.name: Palace Gigs
angles.copy: Experience music in a truly unique setting! The Hampton Court Palace Festival continues this week with more fantastic acts.

angles.name: Regal Rhythms
angles.copy: Still time to catch some incredible artists at the Hampton Court Palace Festival this week! Who's on your must-see list?

moments.title: Love Island UK Season 13 Ongoing
moments.blurb: Love Island UK Season 13 continues nightly on ITV2 and ITVX, with new episodes airing Sunday to Friday at 9pm as the islanders search for love.

angles.name: Villa Drama
angles.copy: Still hooked on Love Island UK? The drama continues nightly on ITV2 and ITVX! Who's your favourite couple (or least favourite)?

angles.name: Island Updates
angles.copy: Catch up on all the latest from the villa! Love Island UK is still bringing the heat every night this week.
